testsuite.name: projects.kankan.controller.CardControllerTest

testcase.name: getCardsByBoardId with column filter should return filtered cards()
getCardsByBoardId should return a list of cards()
updateCardInBoard should update an existing card()
getCardById should return a card when found()
deleteCardFromBoard should delete a card successfully()
addCardToBoard should create a new card()
